spec.title: HTTP requests/minute
spec.description: Tracks how many requests are made per minute overall, as well as by each individual endpoint type.

spec.title: Active users
spec.description: Tracks how many users have made a request within the last 15 minutes.

spec.title: Authentication attempts/minute
spec.description: Tracks how many successful login or register attempts took place

spec.title: CPU and memory usage percentage
spec.description: Tracks metrics at the operating system level.

spec.title: Pizza purchases
spec.description: Tracks how many pizzas are successfully sold or failed to create

spec.title: Revenue/min
spec.description: Tracks how much currency is coming in on average

spec.title: Request latency
spec.description: Tracks the latency of service endpoints

spec.title: Pizza creation latency
spec.description: Tracks the latency for creating pizzas
